documents.title: BM25 basics
documents.text: BM25 is a probabilistic retrieval model that scores documents with term frequency, inverse document frequency, and document length normalization. In Apache Lucene BM25Similarity, the default parameters are k1=1.2 and b=0.75.

documents.title: RAG paper
documents.text: The RAG framework was introduced by Lewis et al. in 2020. It combines parametric memory in a seq2seq model with non-parametric memory from a dense vector index.

documents.title: DPR
documents.text: Dense Passage Retrieval (DPR) uses a dual-encoder architecture with one encoder for questions and another for passages. Retrieval is performed with maximum inner product or cosine similarity in embedding space.

documents.title: RRF
documents.text: Reciprocal Rank Fusion combines multiple ranked lists with score(d) = sum over systems of 1/(k + rank). A common constant is k=60 from the original SIGIR 2009 paper.

documents.title: Hybrid retrieval
documents.text: Hybrid retrieval mixes sparse lexical search such as BM25 with dense vector search. This often improves recall because lexical and semantic retrievers make different errors.

documents.title: Chunking
documents.text: RAG systems typically split long documents into chunks before indexing. Common chunk sizes are around 300 to 800 tokens with overlap to preserve context continuity.

documents.title: Evaluation
documents.text: Retrieval quality is often measured with Recall@k, Hit@k, and MRR. End-to-end QA quality is commonly measured with Exact Match and token-level F1.

documents.title: BM25 in Chinese
documents.text: 在中文檢索中，BM25 仍然有效，但分詞品質會明顯影響結果。若沒有斷詞器，常見替代方案是字元級切分。

documents.title: Vector pitfalls
documents.text: Vector search can miss exact rare keywords such as product code TX-900 or legal clause 18.2. Sparse retrieval is usually stronger for exact term matching.

documents.title: When hybrid wins
documents.text: Hybrid search tends to win on heterogeneous corpora where some questions require exact lexical matches and others require semantic paraphrase matching.

documents.title: Latency tradeoff
documents.text: Compared with a single retriever, hybrid retrieval adds latency because two retrieval systems run in parallel and then merge results.

documents.title: RAG prompt
documents.text: A simple RAG prompt includes the user question and top retrieved passages. The generator should be instructed to answer only from provided context and abstain if evidence is missing.

qa.question: Lucene 的 BM25 預設超參數數值是什麼？
哪個方法把 seq2seq 生成模型和外部向量知識庫一起使用？
DPR 採用哪一種檢索編碼器架構？
倒數排名融合通常使用的常數大約是多少？
同時結合關鍵字比對與語意向量比對的做法叫什麼？
RAG 文件切塊常見大約幾百個 token？
評估檢索排序時，常見三個指標是什麼？
沒有中文斷詞器時，常見替代策略是什麼？
遇到 TX-900 這類精確代碼時，哪種檢索通常更穩？
在什麼資料型態下，混合檢索通常更容易優於單一路徑？
混合檢索相對單一檢索器常見代價是什麼？
RAG prompt 在證據不足時應該怎麼做？
